# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind adds Azure OpenAI assistant and Google sign-in for smoother on-boarding
- Summary: CodeGrind now integrates Azure OpenAI-based AI assistant and Google authentication, streamlining problem solving help and secure sign-ins for faster onboarding.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-and-cloud-sign-in-update
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-cloud-sign-in-update
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-28-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-cloud-sign-in-update.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: Enhance your CodeGrind experience with an AI-assisted problem-solving companion powered by Azure OpenAI and a streamlined Google-based sign-in flow for quicker, secure access.
- CTA: Explore the new AI assistant while signing in with Google today and accelerate your DSA practice.
- Visual brief: A clean UI shot of CodeGrind editor with an AI chat panel on the right and a Google Sign-In button visible; include subtle cyberpunk accents and highlighting the Azure OpenAI logo in a corner. Optional before/after animation showing problem solving aided by AI tips appearing in real-time.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
